review_policy: Official publisher pages manually reviewed; records remain candidates pending repeatable live validation.

records.title: UK-AIR Data Archive
records.publisher: Department for Environment, Food & Rural Affairs
records.description: Official UK air-quality monitoring data archive, including network downloads, data-selection tools and preformatted files.
records.licence: Open Government Licence v3.0 except where the source states otherwise; mapping products may carry additional terms

records.title: Defra Data Services Platform
records.publisher: Department for Environment, Food & Rural Affairs
records.description: Official platform providing access to environmental datasets, APIs and applications from Defra-group organisations.
records.licence: Dataset-specific: commonly Open Government Licence or Environment Agency Conditional Licence; verify each dataset record

records.title: Environment Agency Linked Data APIs
records.description: Official APIs for bathing waters, catchments, ecology and fish, flood monitoring, hydrology and public registers.
records.licence: Open Government Licence v3.0 except where the service states otherwise
records.update_frequency: varies by API; includes near-real-time services

records.title: UK Emissions Data Selector
records.description: Official selector for UK greenhouse-gas and air-pollutant emissions data by year, pollutant, source and reporting classification.
records.licence: Use subject to the NAEI website and selected dataset terms; verify attribution and reuse conditions before use

records.title: BGS OpenGeoscience
records.description: Official free service for viewing and downloading selected geological maps, data, scans, photographs and related information.
records.licence: Product-specific; many OpenGeoscience datasets use the Open Government Licence with BGS acknowledgement requirements
records.geographic_scope: Great Britain and UK offshore areas, product dependent

records.title: Natural England Open Data Geoportal
records.description: Official geographic data portal providing datasets, web applications, services and APIs published by Natural England.
records.licence: Dataset-specific; inspect each record because OGL, non-commercial and third-party constraints can differ

records.title: Environmental Information Data Centre Catalogue
records.description: Official catalogue for environmental research datasets managed by the Environmental Information Data Centre at UKCEH.
records.licence: Dataset-specific; licence and citation requirements are stated on each catalogue record
records.geographic_scope: United Kingdom and wider research coverage, dataset dependent

records.title: Cefas Data Portal
records.publisher: Centre for Environment, Fisheries and Aquaculture Science
records.description: Official marine and fisheries data portal containing searchable metadata records and downloadable datasets supporting open science.
records.licence: Dataset-specific; many public datasets use Open Government Licence v3.0, but verify the individual record
records.geographic_scope: United Kingdom waters and wider marine research coverage
